posts.title: 9 April 1865: Grant’s terms at Appomattox
posts.caption:
📗 Documented baseline: written parole terms; Lee accepts; one army leaves the field without another massed slaughter.

posts.title: SPECULATION: What if Grant demanded harder Appomattox terms?
posts.caption:
⚠️ SIMULATED — not a secret second Appomattox.

Political cost versus field cost. No guaranteed shorter war.
